use_cases: Display customer testimonials with quotes, photos, and ratings on product landing pages
Showcase user success stories and social proof on marketing websites
Feature client feedback in SaaS dashboard or About pages
Build trust and credibility through rotating customer endorsements
Highlight team member endorsements for testimonials sections
ai_summary: A testimonial carousel component featuring customer quotes with profile photos, names, job titles, and star ratings. Implements smooth animated transitions between testimonials using Framer Motion with auto-advancement and manual navigation arrows. Designed to display social proof and user endorsements on landing pages, marketing sites, or dashboard applications.
